introduction: This presentation aims to provide a comprehensive overview of the 2024 National Dealer Sales Conference. We will explore the key discussions, outcomes, and strategic insights from the event.

subsections.heading: Key Discussions and Outcomes
subsections.content:
• Unveiling of new Elexion Automotive EV models and their innovative features
• Review of the 2023 sales performance and comparison with previous years
• Introduction of a new sustainability initiative aimed at reducing production emissions
• Overview and analysis of customer feedback and satisfaction metrics
• Examination of Elexion's market positioning in the competitive EV market
• Discussion on the plans to expand the dealership network across North America
subsections.justification: The content is related to the conference but doesn't provide the specific date it was held.

subsections.heading: 2024 Conference Attendance Analysis
subsections.content:
• Total of 500 attendees, a 10% increase compared to 2023
• 65% of attendees were from Elexion's dealership partners
• Significant presence from non-dealer stakeholders including investors and industry analysts
• 24% increase in international attendees, indicating growing global interest in Elexion
• Breakdown of the attendee demographics by role and industry
• Analysis of attendee engagement metrics from the conference sessions
subsections.justification: While this content provides insights into the conference attendees, it doesn't reveal the conference date.

subsections.heading: Conference Date and Venue Details
subsections.content:
• The venue was chosen for its sustainability efforts and accessibility
• Detailed information on the conference venue's facilities and capacity
• Overview of the logistical challenges and successes of the conference
• Review of the venue contract and negotiation process
• Analysis of attendee satisfaction with the venue and its facilities
• Recap of the event planning and execution process
subsections.justification: This content discusses the venue and conference planning, but does not specify the date it was held.

conclusion: The 2024 National Dealer Sales Conference served as a platform for critical discussions and future planning. To maximize our impact in the next conference, we need to reflect on these insights and align our strategies accordingly.
